trust.reason: Platform-specific build tool variants (e.g. aapt2) cannot be captured from a single-platform dev machine; trusted by classifier rather than hash
Documentation does not affect build output
Source JARs are for IDE navigation only and do not affect build output
Source zip are for IDE navigation only and do not affect build output
